author: terencechain
content:
`--builder-api-url` can only match one buildoor, on our end every other instance rejects its auth (builder_url mismatch) and won't
get bid, can you set it per-instance in buildoor_launcher.star. `cmd.append("--builder-api-url=http://{0}:{1}".format(service_name, BUILDOOR_API_PORT))`
